Texts.LongWelcomeMessage: Welcome to the application. This is a startup project based on the ABP framework. For more information visit
Texts.Ecommerce:00001: Product price must be greater than zero.
Texts.Ecommerce:00002: A product stock cant be less than zero.
Texts.Ecommerce:00003: A product can't belong to more than 1 category.
Texts.Ecommerce:00006: Product must belong to a category.
Texts.Ecommerce:00008: Category cant be its own parent
Texts.Ecommerce:00011: Order must have at least one product.
